content_body: Simply marvelous! We were 4 adults and 3 children staying over the Memorial Day weekend, and we couldn't have been happier with this choice. The cabin is amazingly well maintained and equipped, and has everything you would require...and more. The little details and homely touches make you feel like a special guest in someone's house, rather than a renter! Fully equipped kitchen, fresh linen & towels, toiletries, lots of little and large nooks to play, eat, etc. Ample space, light...and as stated in the description, the views are simply stunning. The location is also ideal, not too far away from town, nor too close. We are already planning a return trip in the fall!
title: Simply Marvelous!
